tasks.description: Brainstorm ideas for improving employee onboarding at a mid-size tech company with multi-framework ideation and feasibility assessment
tasks.input: Brainstorm creative solutions to improve the employee onboarding experience at a mid-size tech company (200 employees). Current onboarding takes 2 weeks and new hires report feeling lost and disconnected. Budget is limited. I need diverse ideas with feasibility ratings.

scoring.5: Generates 15+ ideas spanning 3+ distinct categories (technology, culture, process, mentorship, etc.); uses multiple creativity frameworks; includes cross-domain ideas
scoring.3: Generates 8-14 ideas across 2 categories; uses at least one framework; mostly same-domain thinking
scoring.1: Generates fewer than 8 ideas; all ideas are from the same category or approach
scoring.0: Fewer than 3 ideas or no structured ideation

scoring.5: Visibly applies 2+ creativity frameworks (SCAMPER, Six Hats, TRIZ, lateral thinking); framework application drives idea diversity
scoring.3: References a framework but applies it superficially; ideas don't clearly derive from structured methods
scoring.1: No recognizable framework usage; ideas appear free-associated

scoring.5: Each idea has explicit feasibility scoring (technical viability, resources, time, impact); ideas are classified as viable/promising/speculative; 40%+ are viable or promising
scoring.3: Some ideas have feasibility notes but scoring is informal or incomplete; viability is mentioned but not systematically assessed
scoring.1: Feasibility is mentioned for 1-2 ideas only; no systematic assessment

scoring.5: Ideas are clustered by theme, ranked by priority; top ideas have concrete first steps; includes executive summary and wild cards section
scoring.3: Ideas are grouped but ranking is informal; some actionable detail but not consistently
scoring.1: Flat list of ideas with no clustering or prioritization
